description: Firebase Realtime DB schema for SeatSniper

spots.description: Static spot data (loaded once from study_spots.json)

reports.description: Live crowdsourced reports — written on every user tap

spot_status.description: Aggregated live status — computed from last 5 reports, updated on every new report

availability_logic.note: Computed client-side or by Gemini — NOT stored in Firebase
steps: 2. Check spot.schedule for any block where day matches AND start <= now <= end
3. If a class is running → status = 'in_class' (override any crowdsource report)
4. If no class running → use spot_status.current_status from Firebase
